name: block-kanban-board
title: Kanban board
description: Status columns of draggable cards using native HTML5 drag-and-drop (no extra dependency). Drag a card to another column to move it; the target column highlights on drag-over. For heavy boards, swap in dnd-kit.
postInstall: Swap COLUMNS for your data; wire onMove to persist card moves. For virtualized/touch/multi-drag boards, reach for dnd-kit.
